abstract.text: Protocol defining the API client interface for the wallets SDK.
This abstraction allows for mock implementations during testing.
Gets a price estimate for a token swap.
Verifies email OTP.
Signs EVM typed data.
Sends a Solana transaction.
Initiates MFA verification.
Creates an EVM EOA account.
Gets the delegation status for a specific account address.
Revokes a spend permission for a smart account.
Executes a token swap on behalf of an end user.
Authentication payload types.
Signs an EVM message.
Fetches a user operation by hash.
Embedded wallets SDK for the Coinbase Developer Platform — authenticate users and sign transactions on EVM and Solana chains.
Creates a Solana account.
Refreshes the access token.
Sends an EVM asset (e.g. USDC) to a recipient address.
Protocol defining the API client interface for the wallets SDK.
This abstraction allows for mock implementations during testing.
Initiates authentication.
Logs out the end user.
Gets the status of an EIP-7702 delegation operation.
Signs an EVM hash.
Initiates MFA enrollment for a method.
Submits an MFA enrollment code.
Creates an account-scoped delegation grant for a specific address.
Records that the user was prompted for MFA enrollment.
Authenticates an end user via custom auth JWT.
The JWT must be provided separately (not via middleware) since this operation
is unauthenticated at the middleware level.
Gets the authenticated end user from the API.
A fully-functional mock API client that returns deterministic test data.
Sends a user operation.
Registers a temporary wallet secret.
Verifies third-party OAuth identity payload (Telegram, Apple native).
Creates an EVM smart account.
Sends an EVM transaction.
Gets just the MFA configuration for the project.
Returns nil when the project has no MFA configuration.
Revokes the active delegation for the end user.
Lists spend permissions for a smart account.
Sends a Solana asset (e.g. USDC) to a recipient address.
Signs a Solana transaction.
Creates an EIP-7702 delegation for an end user’s EVM EOA account.
Creates a spend permission for a smart account.
Signs an EVM transaction.
Revokes the delegation for a specific account address.
Verifies OAuth code.
Gets the project configuration including MFA settings.
Submits an MFA verification code.
Creates a delegation grant for the end user.
Verifies SMS OTP.
Verifies a SIWE (Sign In With Ethereum) signature.
Gets the current delegation status for the end user.
Signs a Solana message.
